creator: sblachmann@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Ting-Wei Lan from comment #15)

No. Didn't expect this to be necessary. Mate-terminal works fine without, as well as all KDE, Qt and Gtk apps I use.
I know this is outside the topic of bugzilla, but may I ask which daemons need to be started via .xinitrc to make Gnome apps behave well?
